status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces and Turbo
features.user_visible_behavior: Developer can run pnpm install from root and build all packages. apps/web, apps/api, packages/shared exist with correct configs.
verification: Run pnpm -r build and confirm shared package builds
evidence: pnpm-workspace.yaml present at root with apps/* and packages/*
turbo.json present with build, dev, typecheck, test pipelines
Root package.json with scripts: build, dev, typecheck, lint, test, db:*
packages/shared with 9 Zod schema files (auth, user, workspace, task, comment, notification, attachment, common, index)
apps/web with React + Vite + Tailwind v4 + TanStack Query + socket.io-client
apps/api with Hono + Prisma + Socket.IO + Redis adapter + JWT + bcrypt + LLMProvider
features.notes: Foundation complete; downstream features (auth, workspaces, tasks, collab, AI) all wired to shared package and Prisma schema

features.title: Tailwind v4 design system with Emerald/Teal tokens
features.user_visible_behavior: Web app shows correct Emerald/Teal colors in both light and dark mode. Theme toggle works.
verification: Verify colors match design system spec
Toggle theme and confirm light/dark switch
evidence: apps/web/src/index.css with @import 'tailwindcss' and @theme block
Emerald 50-950 color tokens defined
Teal 50-950 color tokens defined
Status color tokens (todo, progress, done, blocked, review)
Light/dark backgrounds with CSS custom properties
Class-based dark mode with @custom-variant dark
Typography tokens (Page 26px/700/-0.6px, Heading 18px/600, Body 13px/400, Label 10px/600/+0.1em uppercase)
Radius xs 4px, sm 6px, md 8px, lg 12px, full 100px
ThemeProvider with localStorage + system preference + toggle
features.notes: Design tokens fully match design system spec

features.title: Prisma schema with all entities
features.user_visible_behavior: Database migrations run cleanly. All entities (User, Workspace, Task, Column, Comment, etc.) are created.
evidence: prisma/schema.prisma with 13 models: User, Workspace, WorkspaceMember, Column, Task, TaskDependency, TaskLabel, Comment, Notification, Attachment, RefreshToken
All models have id (cuid), createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt? for soft-delete
@@index on all FKs and common filter fields
@@unique on business keys (User.email, Workspace.slug, WorkspaceMember[workspaceId,userId], TaskDependency[blockingTaskId,blockedTaskId], TaskLabel[workspaceId,name])
Explicit @relation names on both sides for all relations
Enums: UserRole, WorkspaceVisibility, TaskPriority, TaskStatus, NotificationType, AttachmentType
prisma/seed.ts with 5 users, 2 workspaces, 24+ tasks, subtasks, dependencies, comments, notifications
features.notes: Schema production-ready with soft-delete and optimistic locking (version field on Task)

features.title: Docker Compose with PostgreSQL, Redis, API, Web
features.user_visible_behavior: docker compose up brings up all services. API accessible at localhost:3000, Web at localhost:5173.
evidence: docker-compose.yml with 4 services: postgres:16-alpine, redis:7-alpine, api, web
Health checks on postgres, redis, api, web
Volume mounts: postgres_data, redis_data, attachments_data
Environment variables for all 4 services
docker/api.Dockerfile: multi-stage (deps → shared → build → runtime) with Prisma migrate deploy on startup
docker/web.Dockerfile: multi-stage (deps → shared → build → nginx runtime)
docker/web.nginx.conf with /api/ proxy to api:3000, /socket.io/ WebSocket upgrade, gzip, security headers
features.notes: API runs prisma migrate deploy on container start, so schema is auto-created

features.title: Shared package with Zod schemas
features.user_visible_behavior: Both apps can import shared types and Zod schemas. Type safety enforced end-to-end.
verification: Import a schema from @flow-desk/shared in API
Import a type from @flow-desk/shared in Web
evidence: packages/shared with tsup build, 9 entry points (index, auth, user, workspace, task, comment, notification, attachment, common)
All schemas use Zod with z.infer type exports
packages/shared package.json exports field for all 9 modules with CJS + ESM + types
apps/api imports @flow-desk/shared/auth, @flow-desk/shared/workspace, @flow-desk/shared/task, @flow-desk/shared/comment, @flow-desk/shared/notification, @flow-desk/shared/attachment
features.notes: Type safety end-to-end via Zod inference; no manual type duplication between apps

features.title: Email/password registration and login with JWT
features.user_visible_behavior: User can register, login, and access protected routes. JWT stored in httpOnly cookie.

features.title: Google OAuth integration
features.user_visible_behavior: User can sign in with Google. Account is created or linked automatically.
verification: Verify user created and JWT cookie set

features.title: Workspace CRUD operations
features.user_visible_behavior: User can create, list, update, and delete workspaces. Creator becomes Owner.
verification: POST /api/workspaces → workspace created with default columns

features.title: Member management with roles
features.user_visible_behavior: Owner/Admin can invite members. Roles: Owner, Admin, Member, Guest. Permissions enforced.

features.title: Task CRUD operations
features.user_visible_behavior: User can create, read, update, soft-delete tasks with title, description, due date, priority.

features.title: Kanban board with drag-and-drop
features.user_visible_behavior: User sees columns (Backlog, Todo, In Progress, Done) with tasks. Drag between columns updates status.
verification: Drag task from Todo to In Progress
Verify status updated in DB and other clients see change

features.title: List/Table view with filters
features.user_visible_behavior: User can switch to list view, sort columns, filter by status/assignee/priority.

features.title: Subtasks and dependencies (A blocks B)
features.user_visible_behavior: User can add subtasks to a task. User can mark A blocks B. Circular dependencies rejected.
verification: Set task A blocks task B
Try to create circular dependency → rejected

features.title: Socket.IO real-time updates
features.user_visible_behavior: Task changes appear instantly across all connected clients without page refresh.
verification: Open board in two browser tabs

features.title: Comments and @mentions
features.user_visible_behavior: User can comment on tasks. @username triggers autocomplete and sends notification.

features.title: In-app notifications with real-time delivery
features.user_visible_behavior: Notification bell shows unread count. Clicking opens list. Mark as read works.

features.title: AI assignment suggestions via OpenAI-compatible API
features.user_visible_behavior: When creating task without assignee, AI suggests best member based on workload and history.

features.title: AI auto-scheduling with dependency awareness
features.user_visible_behavior: AI schedules tasks respecting dependencies and deadlines.

features.title: File attachments
features.user_visible_behavior: User can upload files to tasks. Image preview and download available.

features.title: Realistic seed data
features.user_visible_behavior: Demo workspace populated with users, tasks, comments for testing.
